deals.notes: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Sellers moving back in. Plan to make updates and repairs, relist when timing is right. Underwater by $93K-$143K.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA, 1,886 sqft, 2011 build. Listed $259,900. Sellers relocating to NC, high urgency. Second-look buyers returned - their favorite property.

Investor cash offer at $176,300 discussed with sellers, keeping conversation open
Second-look buyers returned - their favorite. Pre-inspection report offered, rescheduled to May 30

deals.title: 181 CR 7751

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3BR/2BA, 1,809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Divorce situation. Payoff ~$257K. Need $285K-$290K to walk with proceeds. Recommended list $295,000.
